title: nauclea nipponica
intro: Nauclea nipponica, also known as Kutu or Kutu tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia, particularly in countries such as Thailand, Myanmar, and China. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Nauclea nipponica include reducing fever, treating infections, and aiding in the digestive system, and it can be prepared into various herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tonics.
